description: Retrieves the risking response for a specific individual identified by their person reference. Searches across all applications for the matching individual and returns their risking status and any failure details.

pathParameters.name: personReference
pathParameters.description: The unique person reference identifier for the individual. Bound as a PersonReference value class.

body.failures: array of Failure objects or null

responses.description: No Content — person reference not found in any application.

authentication.notes: Rejects if HMRC-AS-AGENT enrolment is already active on the user.

interactions.action: Invoke AuthorisedAction — verify Government Gateway auth, AffinityGroup.Agent, credential role, absence of HMRC-AS-AGENT enrolment
Query MongoDB for ApplicationForRisking containing individual with matching personReference (Filters.eq on 'individuals.personReference')
From the returned application, find the specific IndividualForRisking whose personReference matches
Map IndividualForRisking to IndividualRiskingResponse (personReference, status, failures)
Return 200 OK with IndividualRiskingResponse JSON, or 204 No Content if not found

externalDependencies.name: HMRC Auth Service
externalDependencies.purpose: Validate Government Gateway credentials and retrieve enrolments/credentialRole/internalId

specialCases: Returns 204 (not 404) when the person reference is not found.
After fetching the application by personReference index, the controller performs an in-memory find on the individuals list to locate the exact matching individual.
The unique index on 'individuals.personReference' guarantees at most one application contains a given personReference.
